setting.title: This tool is advised if your marketing campaign is composed of several emails.

setting.name: contact_naming
setting.title: Contact Naming
setting.help: Separate Mailing Contact Names into two fields

setting.name: allow_blacklist_setting_container
setting.title: Allow the recipient to manage themselves their state in the blacklist via the unsubscription page. If the option is active, the 'Blacklist Me' button is hidden on the unsubscription page. The 'come Back' button will always be visible in any case to allow leads and partners to re-subscribe.

setting.name: mass_mailing_reports_setting_container
setting.title: Send a report to the mailing responsible one day after the mailing has been sent.
setting.help: Check how well your mailing is doing a day after it has been sent

setting.name: dedicated_server_setting_container
setting.title: Use a specific mail server in priority. Otherwise Odoo relies on the first outgoing mail server available (based on their sequencing) as it does for normal mails.
setting.help: Pick a dedicated outgoing mail server for your mass mailings
